title: Looking for a EvaWiki citation Eva core LCL back of head
display_title: Looking for a EvaWiki citation Eva core LCL back of head
wikitext:
[]: Looking for a EvaWiki citation (Eva core LCL - back of head)             Quote Post by defiate » Fri Sep 09, 2011 8:47 am I was reading the EvaWiki post on Evangelions ([url]http://wiki.evageeks.org/Evangelions[/url]) and noticed that under "biology and appearance", 5th paragraph, there's a line that says "Cores appear to have their own supply of LCL, and pipes for the liquid connect to the back of Eva's head". I've been an Eva fan since before the turn of the millenium but I have never seen or heard anything related to this. Can someone give me a citation for that line? It's been a looong time since I last posted (2006). Great to see the community still doing what it does best.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Sep 09, 2011 1:10 pm Looks like that entry was added by Ursus on Feb 24 2008 http://wiki.evageeks.org/index.php?title=Evangelions&diff=15247&oldid=15245 I'm not sure if there's any solid evidence for that. It's been posited that the LCL used in the entry plug comes from the core (when Shinji squishes out of Eva-01's core, looks like LCL), I dunno about the pipes though.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Fri Sep 16, 2011 1:46 am I'm pretty sure I remember something about tubes being connected to the back of Lilith's head on the cross, could be confusion with that. IIRC, it was something that was only easy to see in the production drawings shown in one of the Groundwork books or such.
